message:
hardening(frankenterm/*): vendored mux/client/term/window stack — overflow + lifecycle fixes

Sweep across the vendored frankenterm/ (formerly wezterm) crate
ecosystem inside the workspace. 46 files touched across:

  * frankenterm/mux: activity, connui, domain, lib, localpane, pane,
    ssh, ssh_agent, tab, termwiztermtab, tmux, tmux_commands, window —
    overflow-safe `Instant::checked_add` migration in the buffered-data
    parser, replacement of panicking unwraps in the pane dead-detection
    path, and a couple of clean-up commits in the tmux integration.
  * frankenterm/client: client, domain, pane/clientpane,
    pane/renderable — domain-handle plumbing rationalized so dropped
    handles no longer leak background tasks.
  * frankenterm/config: detection, lib, terminal, toml_config,
    wasm_config — config parse paths return Result instead of
    occasionally panicking on malformed input.
  * frankenterm/font/lib.rs: small cleanup.
  * frankenterm/lua-api-crates/mux-lua: pane + tab — Lua FFI error
    propagation.
  * frankenterm/open-url: lib + Cargo.toml — dependency tightening.
  * frankenterm/promise: lib + spawn — task cancellation correctness.
  * frankenterm/pty/win: mod + psuedocon — Windows ConPTY hardening.
  * frankenterm/rangeset/lib.rs: small invariant tightening.
  * frankenterm/ssh: pty + session — SSH session teardown ordering.
  * frankenterm/surface/line/line.rs: minor invariant nudge.
  * frankenterm/term/terminalstate/mod.rs: terminal state bookkeeping.
  * frankenterm/termwiz: render/terminfo, terminal/unix,
    terminal/windows — terminfo / native-terminal lifecycle.
  * frankenterm/toast-notification: dbus + macos + windows — notification
    lifetime + handle ownership.
  * frankenterm/window: connection, os/wayland/data_device,
    os/wayland/window, spawn — window-system lifecycle.

Pattern across all of these is the same as the frankenterm-core sweep:
saturating_add / checked_add migrations and replacing `.unwrap()` /
`Mux::get()` with fallible variants plus context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@ publish = false
 # See more keys and their definitions at https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/reference/manifest.html
 
 [dependencies]
+log.workspace = true
 winapi = {workspace=true, features=["shellapi"]}
 
 [dev-dependencies]
